nasb.text: Now the king was talking with Gehazi, the servant of the man of God, saying, “Please relate to me all the great things that Elisha has done.”

esv.text: Now the king was talking with Gehazi the servant of the man of God, saying, “Tell me all the great things that Elisha has done.”

cnv.text: 那時王正在和神人的僕人基哈西交談，說：“請你向我講述以利沙所作的一切大事。”

ccb.text: 那时，王正与上帝仆人的侍者基哈西谈话，让基哈西把以利沙所做的一切大事讲给他听。
